title: onosma dasytricha
intro: Onosma dasytricha, also known as goldthread, is a flowering plant species in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of China and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is rich in berberine, a bioactive compound that has been shown to have numerous health benefits, including reducing cholesterol levels, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Goldthread can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
